viewpoints.label: Ball spawn
viewpoints.gameplay_meaning: Candidate gameplay landmark for LLM spatial reasoning.
reasons: Primary convergence point at round/reset start.

viewpoints.label: Red spawn cluster
viewpoints.gameplay_meaning: Candidate gameplay landmark for LLM spatial reasoning.
reasons: Clustered 6 red spawn entities by origin proximity.

viewpoints.label: goal_complex_1
viewpoints.gameplay_meaning: Candidate gameplay landmark for LLM spatial reasoning.
reasons: Grouped nearby raw trigger_goal entities into a gameplay scoring-complex candidate.
Raw trigger count is preserved separately and is not treated as final scoring-location count.
